CustomField.description: Profile-based slab targeting. Blank = applies to all profiles (universal fallback).
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Salesforce Profile name this slab applies to (e.g., "Custom: Field Sales Rep"). Leave blank for a universal slab that applies to all profiles. The system matches: 1) Criteria + Profile + Territory, 2) Criteria + Profile, 3) Criteria only, 4) Universal.
CustomField.label: Profile Name
